$comment: SEC-META-01 pending allowlist: every security-guide SEC id without a shipped test MUST map to its owning task file (security-guide §2.1.4-5). The owning task file MUST declare the id on its "**SEC ids owned by THIS task:**" marker line — a prose mention does not confer ownership, and a task naming an id only to disclaim it fails the gate. Entries are removed when the owning task ships a verbatim-id test title; task 28 requires this file empty. An id that is BOTH titled and listed here fails the gate: the row and the title cannot both be true.
